user_query: I'm planning a weekend getaway with my friends to Las Vegas. Can you suggest some popular nightclubs and entertainment venues in the city? Also, find me a good hotel on the Las Vegas Strip and provide the average room rates per night. Additionally, give me a Chuck Norris joke to include in our party playlist.

TaskList.description: Find popular nightclubs and entertainment venues in Las Vegas.
Search for a good hotel on the Las Vegas Strip.
Fetch the average room rates per night for hotels on the Las Vegas Strip.
Get a Chuck Norris joke to include in the party playlist.
